## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and website development for Udemy's new thought leadership initiative](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy likely to use external dev resources for website build, with potential to leverage existing agency relationship](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [GrowthX to support with design mockups, leveraging recent Udemy blog design files](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on AI readiness as initial broad topic, balancing thought leadership with course promotion](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Need to establish clear framework to avoid content cannibalization with existing Udemy properties](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

## Topics

### Website Development Resources

  - [Udemy lacks strong internal web development resources for this project](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Exploring external options, including potentially leveraging existing agency relationship](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide recommendations if needed (e.g., WebStacks)](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [GrowthX to support with design mockups once project scope is clearer](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Design and Branding Alignment

  - [Udemy recently completed design mockups for new consumer-facing blog](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [These files include updated branding, standards, fonts, and sizes](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [GrowthX can leverage these files to ensure consistency while adapting for the new initiative](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Opportunity to blend consumer-side design direction with UB-specific elements](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Content Strategy and Focus

  - [Initial focus on AI readiness as a broad, inclusive topic](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Aiming to balance thought leadership with eventual course promotion](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Need to carefully consider audience targeting to avoid pigeonholing content](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Planning to develop topic clusters and example articles for alignment and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### SEO and Keyword Strategy

  - [GrowthX shared initial keyword list and target areas](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Udemy has existing SEO research and 2026 planning to incorporate](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [Need to align on process to avoid cannibalization with existing Udemy content](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage Udemy's internal analysis of sales calls for keyword insights](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)

### Audience Considerations

  - [Primary focus on decision-makers/organizations, but some content may target individual learners](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Potential to implement design elements that accommodate both audiences where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Leverage existing consumer-side strategy for crossover content](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Udemy to determine website development approach and resources](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Krista to share relevant design files and SEO research with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine content strategy and keyword focus based on Udemy input](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussions to align on cannibalization prevention framework](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Udemy to share upcoming Global Learning and Skills Trends Report with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/PeHAi99s9UthZuaazy6QmpZvKi_hUZu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
